content: Roast is in the oven. Dinner at six, everyone be home.
I'll be there. Leaving the office now.
Studying for a midterm but I'll call after.
On my way, picking up bread.
Can Marco come over after?
Fine by me. Homework first.
Don't forget Grandma's birthday is Sunday. We're driving to Akron.
Already blocked the morning. We'll leave by nine.
I'll come down from school for it.
Tyler has soccer at four. Who's driving?
I've got it. I'll leave early.
Coach said bring cleats and the away jersey.
I can grab Tyler if you're stuck at the office, Dad.
Appreciate it. I'll let you know by three.
Reminder: quarterly review with Hector is the 1st at 10. Donna has the P&L ready.
P&L through February is in the shared folder.
I'm out Friday afternoon for a dentist appointment. Donna's covering the phones.
Great Lakes ISF is missing the consolidator name. Holding until they call back.
Right call. Don't file ISF incomplete. Loop Pat if you can't reach them by noon.
Got the name. Brandon you're clear to file.
Meridian brake rotor entry filed under 8708.30 per Jason's memo.
Meridian's sensor housing is sourced from Mexico now. Flagging the USMCA recheck.
On it. Pull the BOM and I'll rerun the RVC before they commit.
Great Lakes binding ruling is still pending with CBP. About 45 days out.
Roast beef Sunday — 6pm. Everyone home.
Tyler, cleats in the truck?
yup got them
Home for spring break March 13th. Bringing laundry lol.
Grocery run — need anything besides brisket rub?
Add coffee filters.
Can I grab the truck Friday night?
Yes but back by midnight.
Tyler's fall tournament this Saturday — 8:30 kickoff.
I'll be there. Bringing coffee for the sideline crew.
Anyone seen my blue sweatshirt? I think it's here.
In the guest room closet.
Grill's warming up. Ribs at 6.
Am I invited? asking for a friend
im out at practice till 7
Save him a plate.
Christmas: Columbus AM, drive up to Akron by 2.
Confirmed with Helen. She's doing turkey.
Yesss Grandma's stuffing.
Uncle Dan bringing his corn thing?
Yep. And Lisa's sweet potato.
Anniversary — Aug 15. Refectory booked.
26 years. Feels like 15.
Only when you're not mowing.
Fair.
Tyler's parent-teacher — Oct 22, 4:30.
I'll take it. You had the last one.
Midterms next week. Pray for me.
You've got this.
Call anytime, kid.
OSU vs MSU Oct 3 — sec 8A, right?
Yep. You're in.
wish i could go
Next year buddy.
Helen's birthday card — anyone signed?
I'll do it Sunday.
Dan called — Helen's cardiology moved to Apr 9.
Noted. I'll take the day off.
Team dinner Friday — bringing burgers home?
On it.
Pickup Tyler from practice 6:15.
Got it.
Tyler's dentist Feb 4 3:15pm.
I'll pull him from school.
Megan's move-in day May 15.
Truck free. I'll drive.
Grocery pickup at 4.
Need the truck 6-9pm Saturday.
OK. Fill it back up.
Sun church 10am. Leaving 9:30.
Roger.
Helen wants us up Sunday after church.
I'll aim for 2pm arrival Akron.
Coming home Fri PM — bus from Cincy. Arrives 7:20.
I'll grab you at the station.
Tyler soccer car wash Aug 22 10am-2pm.
I'll drop him at 9:45.
Ryan wants us at his place NYE 7pm.
Confirmed. Ashley's doing prime rib.
Vet appt for Buster — Thu 4pm.
Can't, board meeting. You go.
Fine. Ring doorbell going off at 2am — check?
Just a raccoon. Cleared.
Trash Thursday, recycling next week.
Got it out.
Anniversary dinner — Refectory 7:30.
Booked and set.
Q1 filings closed on time — zero misses. Nice work team.
AR looks clean, $18K outstanding — all under 30.
USTR Section 232 review closes April 15.
New CBP CSMS on origin certs — pinned in Filings.
Board meeting minutes uploaded to Drive.
Payroll runs Thursday.
Compliance ping — got a rail-to-truck substitution question.
USMCA quarterly briefing Friday 10am.
Onboarding week 12 wrap-up doc up.
Cohort 3 mentorship applications open.
May invoices batched — 27 out.
Buckeye Textile paid — invoice 4023 closed.
Firm financials review Monday 9am.
Priya + I need a call on Toledo Brake next week.
Tue 2pm work?
Perfect.
Reminder — timesheets due Friday 5pm.
QuickBooks bank reconciliation done for March.
Great. Send Hector the packet.
First solo entry filed — Meridian, line 47.
Clean packet. Well done.
Proud of you Brandon.
Holiday schedule — Nov 26/27 closed. Nov 25 half day.
Confirmed.
Filing queue: 6 open, 3 due this week.
Meridian entry — line items match PO. Ready for review.
Heartland USDA APHIS ack received.
Cardinal Grain USMCA origin table verified.
Ohio Bearings 5106 update pushed.
Green light on Meridian. Send it.
Buckeye Textile 301 exclusion response drafted.
Great Lakes Shipping 232 exclusion — need CBP ruling copy.
Where do I find the ruling copy?
CBP CROSS database. I'll walk you through it.
Toledo Brake CAT quota window closes Wed 5pm.
Move Riverside Steel to Monday's queue.
Riverside Steel 232 exclusion decision Friday.
Cleveland Ag Direct Q1 filing acknowledged.
Nailed the Meridian entry. Marcus checked it.
Nice.
Central Ohio Grain — I want us on the June co-op call.
On it. Booking now.
Ohio Sensor bonded warehouse app cleared.
Big win. Send it to Wins.
Columbus Precision quarterly review Thursday.
Buckeye Fresh Produce phyto cert coordination done.
Question: 232 exclusion timing — 60 or 90 days?
60 for renewals, 90 for new petitions.
Ray Foster wants a call on the Q4 forecast — Tuesday 3pm.
Booked. Zoom link out.
Diane Ramos loved the origin memo.
Nice.
Wesley Palmer flagged an AES filing question. Handling.
Nora Baldwin sent 2027 volume estimates — up 18%.
Great. Fold into Q4 planning.
Peter Chen bonded warehouse — signed.
First call with a new client — Tomas Molina at Cleveland Ag.
You'll do great. Pat can sit in if you want.
Happy to.
Iris Whitaker sent the Cardinal Grain audit packet.
Alan Whitfield wants a 232 exclusion advisory.
Book me on it.
Rachel Nunez confirmed FDA prior notice update.
Ray Foster CC'd me on the Meridian thread. Should I reply?
Yes. Keep it short and factual.
Anthony Rivera (Ohio Bearings) — origin dispute cleared.
Vera Sullivan (Central Ohio Grain) — CoO doc ready.
Marissa Coyle paid — Toledo Brake invoice closed.
Gregory Mahoney (Riverside Steel) — 232 filing accepted.
How do I flag a client comm as urgent?
Add !urgent tag in the subject and ping filings.
